briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Define the enumeration of table recognition strategies (wo_external_bounds, one_cell_table, split_last_column) used by the PDF image table recognizer.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: Table type configuration for the TableRecognizer subsystem. \par \b Input\/ \: None (configuration class instantiated on demand). \par \b Output\/ \: TableTypeAdditionalOptions instance with strategy flags. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(8): dedoc.readers.pdf_reader.pdf_image_reader.table_recognizer.TableRecognizer] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: TableTypeAdditionalOptions ALWAYS provides three strategy flags. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why class with string constants instead of Python Enum? A: Maintains backward compatibility with existing parameter passing via string values. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging.] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
CLASS [8][Table recognition strategy enumerator] => TableTypeAdditionalOptions \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
